suite.name: 02 Analytics

kw.name: Get Time
kw.doc: Returns the given time in the requested format.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Seed Audit Events Into Org
Connect To Database
kw.doc: Creates a database connection using the DB API 2.0 ``db_module`` and the parameters provided. Along with listed commonly used arguments (`db_name`, `db_host` etc.) you can set any other DB module specific parameters as key/value pairs.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.arg: (id, event_key, actor_user_id, actor_session_id, org_id, workspace_id, trace_id, span_id, audit_category, outcome, metadata)
CASE i % 3 WHEN 0 THEN '${prefix}.evt.alpha' WHEN 1 THEN '${prefix}.evt.beta' ELSE '${prefix}.evt.gamma' END,
'setup', CASE i % 4 WHEN 3 THEN 'failure' ELSE 'success' END,
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

kw.name: Disconnect From Database
kw.doc: Disconnects from the database.
Insert 12 demo audit events for the given user/org via raw SQL. Uses category='setup' to bypass scope CHECK when workspace_id missing. Generates 36-char UUID v7 ids via gen_random_uuid().

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

test.name: Analytics Tab Renders All Panels

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

test.doc: Navigate to the Analytics tab; verify funnel builder, retention grid, and saved views panel all render.

test.name: Funnel Returns Steps For Seeded Events

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Expected at least 2 funnel step rows; got ${items}
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Run a 2-step funnel with the seeded event keys; verify the result panel appears and both steps are listed.

test.name: Saved View Create And Delete

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Expected at least 1 saved view in list; got ${count}
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Get Elements
kw.doc: Returns a reference to Playwright [https://playwright.dev/docs/api/class-locator|Locator] for all matched elements by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Run Keyword And Return Status
Get Element
kw.doc: Returns a reference to a Playwright [https://playwright.dev/docs/api/class-locator|Locator].
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

test.doc: Save current filter as a named view, verify it appears in the list, then delete it and verify list is empty again.

test.name: CSV Export Link Present

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the HTML ``attribute`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Verify the Export CSV link is rendered in the page header and points to the backend CSV endpoint.

kw.name: Connect To Database
kw.doc: Creates a database connection using the DB API 2.0 ``db_module`` and the parameters provided. Along with listed commonly used arguments (`db_name`, `db_host` etc.) you can set any other DB module specific parameters as key/value pairs.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.arg: DELETE FROM "04_audit"."60_evt_audit" WHERE event_key LIKE '${prefix}.%' OR metadata->>'tag' = '${prefix}';
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

kw.name: Disconnect From Database
kw.doc: Disconnects from the database.

kw.name: Connect To Database
kw.doc: Creates a database connection using the DB API 2.0 ``db_module`` and the parameters provided. Along with listed commonly used arguments (`db_name`, `db_host` etc.) you can set any other DB module specific parameters as key/value pairs.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.arg: DELETE FROM "04_audit"."60_evt_audit" WHERE event_key LIKE '${prefix}.%' OR metadata->>'tag' = '${prefix}';
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

kw.name: Disconnect From Database
kw.doc: Disconnects from the database.

kw.name: Connect To Database
kw.doc: Creates a database connection using the DB API 2.0 ``db_module`` and the parameters provided. Along with listed commonly used arguments (`db_name`, `db_host` etc.) you can set any other DB module specific parameters as key/value pairs.

kw.name: Execute Sql String
kw.doc: Executes the ``sql_string`` - as a single SQL command (default) or as separate statements.

kw.name: Disconnect From Database
kw.doc: Disconnects from the database.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Audit Analytics — funnel, retention, saved views, CSV export. Shares the same seed pattern as 01_explorer.robot (12 events per prefix, 3 event types: .evt.alpha / .evt.beta / .evt.gamma). Each test case builds on the one before within the suite.
